ksa_text: Skill in triaging data pipeline incidents, including failure identification, impact assessment, escalation decision-making, status communication to affected consumers, and remediation coordination.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-005 (OP, Skill) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4434 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.443, ddat=0.422, eu_ai_act=0.419. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4434 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-S-005 (OP, composite 0.4434) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4434 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4434 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4434, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
